findings.title: Accessibility: 7 form inputs without labels in AllotmentAnalytics.tsx
findings.description: frontend\src\components\admin\AllotmentAnalytics.tsx has form inputs without associated labels. Screen readers cannot identify these inputs, making the form unusable for visually impaired users. This also violates WCAG 2.1 Success Criterion 1.3.1.
findings.suggestion: Add <label htmlFor="inputId"> or aria-label attribute to every form input.

findings.title: Memory leak: useEffect without cleanup in AllotmentAnalytics.tsx
findings.description: At line 71: useEffect subscribes to events/timers but has no cleanup function. On component unmount, the subscription stays active, causing memory leaks and "setState on unmounted component" warnings.
findings.suggestion: Return a cleanup function from useEffect: return () => { clearInterval(timer); unsubscribe(); }.

findings.title: 4 API calls without error handling in CorporateUserRegistration.tsx
findings.description: frontend\src\components\admin\CorporateUserRegistration.tsx makes 4 API calls without error handling. Network failures, 500 errors, or auth expiry cause uncaught promise rejections. Users see nothing — the action silently fails.
findings.suggestion: Handle API errors: show toast notification, display inline error message, or redirect to error page. Use React Query's onError callback.

findings.title: Form without client-side validation in DayUseAnalytics.tsx
findings.description: frontend\src\components\admin\DayUseAnalytics.tsx has a form without apparent validation. Users can submit invalid data, causing backend errors with poor error messages. Client-side validation provides instant feedback.
findings.suggestion: Use react-hook-form with Zod schema validation. Validate on blur for individual fields, on submit for the full form.

findings.title: Missing loading state: PaymentIntegrationWidget.tsx
findings.description: frontend\src\components\guest\PaymentIntegrationWidget.tsx fetches data but doesn't show a loading indicator. Users see a blank screen or stale data while the API call is in progress, making the app feel broken.
findings.suggestion: Add loading state: if (isLoading) return <LoadingSpinner />. Use skeleton screens for better UX.

findings.title: Page without error boundary: AdminAPIManagement.tsx
findings.description: frontend\src\pages\admin\AdminAPIManagement.tsx has no error boundary. If any child component throws, the ENTIRE page crashes with a white screen. Users see nothing — no error message, no way to recover.
findings.suggestion: Wrap page content in <ErrorBoundary fallback={<ErrorPage />}>. Import from your ErrorBoundary component.

findings.suggestion: Handle API errors: show toast notification, display inline error message, or redirect to error page. Use React Query's onError callback.

findings.title: Form without client-side validation in AdminRoomTaxes.tsx
findings.description: frontend\src\pages\admin\AdminRoomTaxes.tsx has a form without apparent validation. Users can submit invalid data, causing backend errors with poor error messages. Client-side validation provides instant feedback.
findings.suggestion: Use react-hook-form with Zod schema validation. Validate on blur for individual fields, on submit for the full form.

findings.title: Fixed pixel widths may break mobile: AlertsDashboard.tsx
findings.description: frontend\src\pages\admin\alerts\AlertsDashboard.tsx uses 5 fixed pixel widths. These don't adapt to different screen sizes, breaking the layout on mobile devices and tablets.
findings.suggestion: Use responsive units: %, vw, rem. Use Tailwind responsive prefixes: sm:, md:, lg:. Set max-width instead of width.

FrontendQualityAgent.description: Analyzes React frontend for accessibility, error handling, performance, type safety, and UX patterns
FrontendQualityAgent.summary: Frontend quality analysis complete. 204 pages, 444 components analyzed.
